title: Surgeries - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth
text_excerpt: Surgeries - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth Skip to main content Hit enter to search or ESC to close Close Search Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact Surgery Sign Up I hold regular in-person surgeries throughout the constituency and can also offer online appointments. These are opportunities to discuss the issues that matter to you, work you would like me to know about, and personal challenges I might be able to support you with practically. All surgeries are by appointment only for security reasons. Often myself and my team can help you in advance to make best use of your time. Please fill out the form in full below to enable us to do so – I can assure you that all correspondence with my team is completely confidential. You can read my Privacy Policy here . Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Full Name * else? up to Address * I require this to confirm you are a constituent Postcode * I require this to confirm you are a constituent Email * This is necessary to further discuss a surgery appointment Mobile Please could you tell me a little bit about what you would like to discuss? Are you writing on behalf of yourself or someone else? Myself Someone else If you are writing on behalf of someone else, do you have their permission to do so? Yes No Would you like to sign up to my monthly newsletter to receive updates about my work here and in Westminster? Yes please No thanks You can opt out at any time! Submit Alternatively, you can also get in touch with me by sending and email to; emma.foody.mp@parliament.uk , or addressed mail to me at my parliamentary office: Emma Foody MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. Please make sure to include: A brief summary of the issue you would like to talk to me about. Your full postal address (I can only assist people living in the Cramlington and Killingworth constituency). If you are writing on behalf of someone else, their written permission for you to act for them. You can also contact my office on 0191 429 8750 I look forward to meeting with you and supporting you however I can. © 2026 Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth. twitter facebook phone email Close Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact
